The '''Imperial Sniper''' was a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|Repulsorlift]] craft piloted by one person. It featured a large open seat, two [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] cannons and a grappling claw.<ref name="Kenner" />

Although it was later used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], this vehicle was already used on [[Tammuz-an/Legends|Tammuz-an]] in [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]], where it was involved in a scuffle between the [[Ko Zatec-Cha]] gang and [[Mon Julpa]]'s forces.<ref name="Droids" /> It eventually saw use on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
This vehicle was released by [[Kenner Products|Kenner]] in [[1985]] as part of the [[Body-Rigs]] series.<ref name="Kenner" />

==Appearances==
[[File:Imperial_Sniper_package_art.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Imperial Snipers flying over [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]]]
